zh.Blatherwycke, Northamptonshire, England: 英國諾薩普頓史爾布拉黑維可
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Langford於大約1465年出生在英國威爾斯丹比爾盧時，他的父親Edward Langford26歲，母親Eleanor Dutton34歲。他和Katherine Norreys至少有1個兒子和3個女兒。他去世於1531年12月26日在英國威爾斯丹比爾享年67歲。

zh-hans.Blatherwycke, Northamptonshire, England: 英国諾薩普頓史爾布拉黑維可
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John Langford于大约1465年出生在英国威尔斯丹比爾盧时，他的父亲Edward Langford26岁，母亲Eleanor Dutton34岁。他和Katherine Norreys至少有1个儿子和3个女儿。他去世于1531年12月26日在英国威尔斯丹比爾享年67岁。

nameMeanings.name: Langford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of several places called with Old English lang ‘long’ + ford ‘ford’, such as Langford (Bedfordshire, Nottinghamshire, Essex, Norfolk).

variants.name: Lankford
meanings: English: apparently a variant of   Langford  .

variants.name: Langfitt
meanings: Probably an altered form of English   Langford  .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Langford was born about 1465, in Ruthin, Denbighshire, Wales, United Kingdom, his father, Edward Langford, was 26 and his mother, Eleanor Dutton, was 34. He had at least 1 son and 3 daughters with Katherine Norreys. He died on 26 December 1531, in Denbighshire, Wales, United Kingdom, at the age of 67.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Langford est né environ 1465, à Ruthin, Denbighshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, son père, Edward Langford, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Eleanor Dutton, avait 34 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles avec Katherine Norreys. Il est décédé le 26 décembre 1531, à Denbighshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 67 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John Langford um 1465 in Ruthin, Denbighshire, Wales, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Edward Langford 26 und seine Mutter Eleanor Dutton 34. Er hatte mit Katherine Norreys mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 26. Dezember 1531 im Alter von 67 Jahren in Denbighshire, Wales, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Langford è nato il circa 1465 nel Ruthin, Denbighshire, Galles, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Edward Langford, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Eleanor Dutton, aveva 34 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie con Katherine Norreys. Morì il 26 dicembre 1531, nel Denbighshire, Galles, Regno Unito, all'età di 67 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Langfordが約1465年にイギリスウェールズデンビグhシュアイアルスインで生まれた時，父Edward Langfordは26歳，母Eleanor Duttonは34歳であった。彼はKatherine Norreysとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼は1531年12月26日にイギリスウェールズデンビグhシュアイアで67歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Langford(이)가 대략 1465년 영국 웨일스 덴비그h실르 루스인에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Edward Langford(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Eleanor Dutton(은)는 34세였다. 그는 Katherine Norreys(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1531년 12월 26일 영국 웨일스 덴비그h실르에서 67세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Langford nasceu aproximadamente 1465, em Ruthin, Denbighshire, Gales, United Kingdom, seu pai, Edward Langford, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Eleanor Dutton, tinha 34 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas com Katherine Norreys. Ele faleceu em 26 de dezembro de 1531, em Denbighshire, Gales, United Kingdom, com 67 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Langford родился около 1465 г. в местности рутин, денбаишир, Уэльс, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Edward Langford было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Eleanor Dutton, 34. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери от Katherine Norreys. Он умер 26 декабря 1531 г. в местности денбаишир, Уэльс, Великобритания в возрасте 67 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir John Langford nació aproximadamente 1465, en Ruthin, Denbighshire, Gales, Reino Unido, su papá, Edward Langford, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Eleanor Dutton, tenía 34 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 3 hijas con Katherine Norreys. Murió el 26 de diciembre de 1531, en Denbighshire, Gales, Reino Unido, a la edad de 67 años.
